terminal_size_t(3) Library Functions Manual terminal_size_t(3)

NAME

terminal_size_t - Terminal size structure.

SYNOPSIS

#include <include/ascii-chat/platform/terminal.h>

Data Fields


int rows
Number of rows (height) in terminal. int cols
Number of columns (width) in terminal.

Detailed Description

Terminal size structure.

Contains terminal dimensions in rows and columns.

Note

Rows represent height (vertical dimension).

Columns represent width (horizontal dimension).

Definition at line 163 of file terminal.h.

Field Documentation

int terminal_size_t::cols

Number of columns (width) in terminal.

Definition at line 165 of file terminal.h.

Referenced by action_show_capabilities_immediate(), options_config_print_options_sections_with_width(), options_print_help_for_mode(), sdp_detect_terminal_capabilities(), terminal_get_effective_width(), and terminal_screen_render().

int terminal_size_t::rows

Number of rows (height) in terminal.

Definition at line 164 of file terminal.h.

Referenced by action_show_capabilities_immediate(), sdp_detect_terminal_capabilities(), terminal_get_effective_height(), and terminal_screen_render().
